input.description: Find all files using these two types

content.text: Both types are only referenced within the file itself — `PlayerDataExtraEmailType` feeds `PlayerDataEmailType` and `PlayerDataType`, while `PlayerDataEmailType` feeds `PlayerDataEmailDisplayType`. Nothing imports them externally. The fix is to drop `export` from both.

input.old_string:
export type PlayerDataExtraEmailType = Pick<PrismaPlayerExtraEmailType, 'email'> & { verified: boolean };

export interface PlayerDataEmailType {
input.new_string:
type PlayerDataExtraEmailType = Pick<PrismaPlayerExtraEmailType, 'email'> & { verified: boolean };

interface PlayerDataEmailType {

result.output: The file /Volumes/Development/next-www-toastboy/src/types/PlayerDataType.ts has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.description: Run typecheck to confirm no regressions

content.text: Clean. Removed `export` from both `PlayerDataExtraEmailType` and `PlayerDataEmailType` — they're internal building blocks used only within [PlayerDataType.ts](src/types/PlayerDataType.ts).
